items.title: The Parent Writing Circles Initiative- Relinquishment of Council Office Budget
items.action: Councilmember Taplin added as a co-sponsor. Adopted Resolution No. 71,962–N.S. amended to include contributions from the following Councilmembers up to the amounts listed: Councilmember Taplin - $500; Councilmember Lunaparra - $200; Councilmember Blackaby - $250; Councilmember Tregub - $150; Councilmember Humbert - $200; Councilmember Kesarwani - $100; Councilmember O’Keefe - $250; Mayor Ishii - $250.

items.action: Mayor Ishii and Councilmember Tregub added as co-sponsors. Approved recommendation. Tuesday, September 16, 2025 ANNOTATED AGENDA Page 6 Public Comment – Items Not Listed on the Agenda - 5 speakers. Adjournment Action: M/S/C (Taplin/Tregub) to adjourn the meeting. Vote: All Ayes.
